content:
## System Health — 14:00 UTC

Overall the system is in good shape heading into the afternoon. Gibraltar has been running clean all morning with error rates holding steady at 0.18–0.22%, well within the 1% SLO threshold. No anomalies worth flagging there.

OrderBond latency has been trending slightly upward since approximately 13:15 UTC — p99 climbed from 320ms to 410ms over the last 45 minutes. No errors yet and still within SLO, but worth watching. This pattern has historically preceded increased error rates when Expedia traffic picks up in the late afternoon window.

Hotel Services is performing exceptionally well — error rate near zero and p99 latency at 180ms, well below the 500ms threshold. Recent caching changes appear to be holding.

Unicorn and Amex Services both nominal. No trends worth noting.

**One thing to watch:** OrderBond latency creep. If p99 crosses 500ms in the next hour it may warrant investigation into the Expedia connection pool configuration.
